posts.text:
The Trump administration just announced it was lifting sanctions on Iranian oil, allowing them to sell their oil freely that is at sea.

This is being depicted as yet another huge blow to Iran.


Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent (@SecScottBessent)

Iran is the head of the snake for global terrorism, and through President Trump’s Operation Epic Fury, we are winning this critical fight at an even faster pace than anticipated.  In response to Iran’s terrorist attacks against global energy infrastru

As I said earlier, White House officials and Fox News are telling Trump that the vast majority of Americans support his war in Iran (they're also saying it publicly), even though the opposite is true: so now he thinks that CNN said that 100% of Americans support it.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump on troop deployments: I seem to have great support. CNN came out with a poll today that I'm at 100%. They said they have never seen a poll like that. The CNN poll said I'm at 100%.

Video
  





— https://nitte

People who say "TDS" are mindless idiots.

This "derangement syndrome" cliché was coined by neocon Charles Krauthammer, who exploited his psychiatry degree to cast criticisms of George W. Bush as a mental illness (Bush Derangement Syndrome).

Ever since, partisans invoke it to do the same for their leader.

This sounds like a very, very, very far distance from "unconditional surrender," but if Trump wants to declare victory and pretend that something important was accomplished so that he can pull out, the sooner the better. 

Let him throw a parade for himself if that will help.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2035102800074432620#m

MAGA:

I support Trump's attack on Iran because it's not a war.

OK, it's a war but a short one.

It's not that short but I support it because it's not regime-change.

OK, it's a regime-change war but there are no boots on the ground.

NEXT:

There are boots on the ground, but..


CBS News (@CBSNews)

BREAKING: The Pentagon is preparing detailed plans for a possible U.S. ground force deployment in Iran, sources say.  cbsn.ws/4bsFiCw




— https://nitter.net/CBSNews/status/2035064689231589584#m

Does Lebanon have the right to exist?


sarah (@sahouraxo)

This is Beirut today.

Israel is wiping out entire residential buildings in densely populated neighborhoods of Lebanon’s capital.

Not military targets.

Homes.
Civilian life reduced to rubble.

Video

The Trump Admin has worked from Day 1 to suppress political speech at American universities by radically expanding what "anti-Semitism" includes under "hate speech" codes.

Australians get arrested for using this phrase. We have the 1st Am, but Trump DOJ is working around it:


Jenin Younes (@JeninYounesEsq)

they are arguing that "from the river to the sea" isn't protected speech



— https://nitter.net/JeninYounesEsq/status/2035065287679119438#m

Say what you want about Miriam Adelson, but nobody gets better returns on her political investments and politician purchases. Credit where due.


The Wall Street Journal (@WSJ)

The Trump administration is suing Harvard University, alleging the school violated Jewish students’ civil rights in the latest escalation of the government’s year-long campaign against the Ivy League school on.wsj.com/3NM06gC
